## 🎮 Pick your challenge

<img width="250px" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/408c6397-cdab-4c70-8444-ddd500454e82" align="right">


You are the lead **Developant** in the magical world of **Codia**, where enchanted projects live in harmony on the **Sacred Mainline**.

Disaster has struck! A mysterious glitch in the fabric of version control has _forced_ reality to recursively **fork**, scattering space across unstable branches and leaving many buildsmiths' _HEAD_ detached. The rollabackers and patchsmiths can no longer contain the codentaurs and deadloques that have run wild.

The Order of the Refactortoise has consulted our land's best Artificatarians and discovered the only way to restore the sacrid is to **seek the aid of three mythical creatures**.

- :octocat: **Mona** – Guardian of the Archives
- :copilot: **Copilot** – Oracle of Predictive Spells
- 🐤 **Ducky** – Spirit of Bug-Busting Clarity

Each will grant you a magical gift. When united, they form the **Merge of Legends**, a powerful relic capable of healing corrupted time.

### Which path do you seek?

> Select 1 challenge then wait a moment (max 15 seconds). Do **not** click **Create sub-issue**.

- [ ] Ducky - Beginner
- [ ] Mona - Intermediate
- [ ] Copilot - Advanced
